i18n.en: utilities.  The executed script is read from stdin, and remaining arguments are passed to the script.
i18n.zh-CN: 标准输入/输出（依命令而定）

i18n.en: arguments to the script.
i18n.zh-CN: 选项结束标记

i18n.en: Aborting instead of exiting causes a core file to be generated for analysis.
i18n.zh-CN: 未捕获异常时 abort 而不是退出

i18n.en: Allow file system read access when using the permission model.
Allow file system write access when using the permission model.
Allow using native addons when using the permission model.
Allow spawning process when using the permission model.
i18n.zh-CN: 权限模型：允许子进程

i18n.en: Allow inspector access when using the permission model.
Allow execution of WASI when using the permission model.
Allow creating worker threads when using the permission model.
i18n.zh-CN: 权限模型：允许 worker

i18n.en: Print source-able bash completion script for Node.js.
Use custom conditional exports conditions.  string

Start the V8 CPU profiler on start up, and write the CPU profile to disk before exit. If --cpu-prof-dir is not specified, the profile will be written to the current working directory with a generated file name.
i18n.zh-CN: 进程退出时生成 CPU profile

i18n.en: The directory where the CPU profiles generated by --cpu-prof will be placed.  The default value is controlled by the --diagnostic-dir.  command-line option.
The sampling interval in microseconds for the CPU profiles generated by --cpu-prof.  The default is 1000.
File name of the V8 CPU profile generated with --cpu-prof.

Set the directory for all diagnostic output files.  Default is current working directory.  Set the directory to which all diagnostic output files will be written to.  Defaults to current working directory.  Affects the default output directory of: --cpu-prof-dir.  --heap-prof-dir.  --redirect-warnings.

Disable the `Object.prototype.__proto__` property. If mode is `delete`, the property will be removed entirely. If mode is `throw`, accesses to the property will throw an exception with the code `ERR_PROTO_ACCESS`.
Disable trap-handler-based WebAssembly bound checks and fall back to inline bound checks so that WebAssembly can be run with limited virtual memory.
Make built-in language features like `eval` and `new Function` that generate code from strings throw an exception instead. This does not affect the Node.js `vm` module.
Enable FIPS-compliant crypto at startup.  Requires Node.js to be built with ./configure --openssl-fips.
i18n.zh-CN: 启用 FIPS 模式

i18n.en: Enable Source Map V3 support for stack traces.
Interpret the entry point as a URL.
Enable experimental addon module support.
Specifies the configuration file to load.
Enable support for automatically loading node.config.json.
Enable experimental ES modules support for import.meta.resolve().
i18n.zh-CN: 实验：import.meta.resolve

i18n.en: Specify the module to use as a custom module loader.
i18n.zh-CN: 实验：自定义 loader（已弃用）

i18n.en: Enable the permission model.
Use this flag to enable ShadowRealm support.
i18n.zh-CN: 实验：ShadowRealm

i18n.en: Enable code coverage in the test runner.
i18n.zh-CN: 实验：内置 test runner 覆盖率

i18n.en: Enable module mocking in the test runner.
i18n.zh-CN: 实验：test runner 的模块 mock

i18n.en: Enable transformation of TypeScript-only syntax into JavaScript code.
Enable experimental support for the EventSource Web API.
Disable experimental support for the WebSocket API.
Enable experimental support for the Web Storage API.
Disable top-level await keyword support in REPL.
Disable the experimental node:sqlite module.
Disable type-stripping for TypeScript files.
Enable experimental ES module support in VM module.
i18n.zh-CN: 实验：vm.Module / SourceTextModule

i18n.en: Enable experimental WebAssembly System Interface support. This flag is no longer required as WASI is enabled by default.
i18n.zh-CN: 实验：WASI Preview1

i18n.en: Enable the experimental QUIC support.
Enable experimental support for inspector network resources.
Disable loading native addons that are not context-aware.
Force FIPS-compliant crypto on startup (Cannot be disabled from script code).  Same requirements as --enable-fips.
i18n.zh-CN: 强制 FIPS（任何禁用尝试都报错）

i18n.en: Enable experimental frozen intrinsics support.
i18n.zh-CN: 冻结 Object.prototype 等内置原型

i18n.en: Generate heap snapshot when the V8 heap usage is approaching the heap limit.  No more than the specified number of snapshots will be generated.
Generate heap snapshot on specified signal.

Start the V8 heap profiler on start up, and write the heap profile to disk before exit. If --heap-prof-dir is not specified, the profile will be written to the current working directory with a generated file name.
i18n.zh-CN: 进程退出时生成堆 profile

i18n.en: The directory where the heap profiles generated by --heap-prof will be placed.  The default value is controlled by the --diagnostic-dir.  command-line option.
The average sampling interval in bytes for the heap profiles generated by --heap-prof.  The default is 512 * 1024.
File name of the V8 heap profile generated with --heap-prof.
Specify ICU data load path.  Overrides NODE_ICU_DATA.
Set the module resolution type for input via --eval, --print or STDIN.
i18n.zh-CN: stdin 解释方式（module/commonjs）

i18n.en: Activate inspector on host:port and break at start of user script.
Set the host:port to be used when the inspector is activated.
i18n.zh-CN: 指定 inspector 端口

i18n.en: Specify how the inspector WebSocket URL is exposed.  Valid values are stderr and http.  Default is stderr,http.
Activate inspector on host:port and wait for debugger to be attached.
Activate inspector on host:port.  Default is 127.0.0.1:9229.

Use an insecure HTTP parser that accepts invalid HTTP headers. This may allow interoperability with non-conformant HTTP implementations. It may also allow request smuggling and other HTTP attacks that rely on invalid headers being accepted. Avoid using this option.
i18n.zh-CN: 宽松 HTTP 解析器（不推荐）

i18n.en: Disable runtime allocation of executable memory. This may be required on some platforms for security reasons. It can also reduce attack surface on other platforms, but the performance impact may be severe.
The file used to store localStorage data.
Specify the maximum size of HTTP headers in bytes. Defaults to 16 KiB.
i18n.zh-CN: HTTP 头最大字节数

i18n.en: Sets the maximum memory size of V8's old memory section as a percentage of available system memory.  This flag takes precedence over --max-old-space-size when both are specified. The percentage parameter must be a number greater than 0 and up to 100, representing the percentage of available system memory to allocate to the V8 heap.
This option is a no-op.  It is kept for compatibility.
i18n.zh-CN: （保留兼容选项）

i18n.en: Silence deprecation warnings.
i18n.zh-CN: 完全禁用 deprecation 警告

i18n.en: Hide extra information on fatal exception that causes exit.
i18n.zh-CN: 致命异常时不打印额外信息

i18n.en: Disable runtime checks for `async_hooks`.  These will still be enabled dynamically when `async_hooks` is enabled.

Disable the `node-addons` exports condition as well as disable loading native addons. When `--no-addons` is specified, calling `process.dlopen` or requiring a native C++ addon will fail and throw an exception.
i18n.zh-CN: 禁用 native addons

i18n.en: Do not search modules from global paths.
i18n.zh-CN: 不在全局路径中查找模块

i18n.en: Silence all process warnings (including deprecations).
i18n.zh-CN: 禁用所有 process warning

i18n.en: Enable extra debug checks for memory leaks in Node.js internals. This is usually only useful for developers debugging Node.js itself.
Load an OpenSSL configuration file on startup.  Among other uses, this can be used to enable FIPS-compliant crypto if Node.js is built with ./configure --openssl-fips.
i18n.zh-CN: 指定 OpenSSL 配置文件

i18n.en: Emit pending deprecation warnings.
i18n.zh-CN: 把 pending deprecation 当成警告

i18n.en: Instructs the module loader to preserve symbolic links when resolving and caching modules other than the main module.
i18n.zh-CN: 解析模块时保留符号链接

i18n.en: Instructs the module loader to preserve symbolic links when resolving and caching the main module.
i18n.zh-CN: main 入口模块也保留符号链接
启用 V8 内置 profiler

i18n.en: Process V8 profiler output generated using the V8 option --prof.
i18n.zh-CN: 处理 V8 profiler 输出

i18n.en: Write process warnings to the given file instead of printing to stderr.
i18n.zh-CN: 把 warning 重定向到文件

i18n.en: Write diagnostic reports in a compact format, single-line JSON.
i18n.zh-CN: 紧凑模式生成报告

i18n.en: Location at which the diagnostic report will be generated.  The `file` name may be an absolute path. If it is not, the default directory it will be written to is controlled by the --diagnostic-dir.  command-line option.
Name of the file to which the diagnostic report will be written.

Enables the diagnostic report to be triggered on fatal errors (internal errors within the Node.js runtime such as out of memory) that leads to termination of the application. Useful to inspect various diagnostic data elements such as heap, stack, event loop state, resource consumption etc. to reason about the fatal error.
i18n.zh-CN: 致命错误时生成诊断报告

i18n.en: Enables diagnostic report to be generated upon receiving the specified (or predefined) signal to the running Node.js process. Default signal is SIGUSR2.
i18n.zh-CN: 收到信号时生成诊断报告

i18n.en: Sets or resets the signal for diagnostic report generation (not supported on Windows). Default signal is SIGUSR2.
Enables diagnostic report to be generated on un-caught exceptions. Useful when inspecting JavaScript stack in conjunction with native stack and other runtime environment data.
i18n.zh-CN: 未捕获异常时生成诊断报告

i18n.en: Specify the size of the OpenSSL secure heap. Any value less than 2 disables the secure heap. The default is 0. The value must be a power of two.
i18n.zh-CN: 保护堆大小（OpenSSL 用）

i18n.en: Specify the minimum allocation from the OpenSSL secure heap. The default is 2. The value must be a power of two.
i18n.zh-CN: 保护堆最小分配粒度

i18n.en: The maximum number of test files that the test runner CLI will execute concurrently.
Require a minimum threshold for branch coverage (0 - 100).
A glob pattern that excludes matching files from the coverage report
Require a minimum threshold for function coverage (0 - 100).
A glob pattern that only includes matching files in the coverage report
Require a minimum threshold for line coverage (0 - 100).
Configures the test runner to exit the process once all known tests have finished executing even if the event loop would otherwise remain active.
Specifies a module containing global setup and teardown functions for the test runner.
Configures the type of test isolation used in the test runner.
A regular expression that configures the test runner to only execute tests whose name matches the provided pattern.
A test reporter to use when running tests.
The destination for the corresponding test reporter.
Configures the tests runner to persist the state of tests to allow rerunning only failed tests.
Configures the test runner to only execute top level tests that have the `only` option set.
Test suite shard to execute in a format of <index>/<total>.
A regular expression that configures the test runner to skip tests whose name matches the provided pattern.
A number of milliseconds the test execution will fail after.
Regenerates the snapshot file used by the test runner for snapshot testing.
Throw errors for deprecations.
i18n.zh-CN: 把 deprecation warning 当成异常抛

i18n.en: Specify process.title on startup.
i18n.zh-CN: 设置进程标题

i18n.en: Specify an alternative default TLS cipher list.  Requires Node.js to be built with crypto support. (Default)
Log TLS key material to a file. The key material is in NSS SSLKEYLOGFILE format and can be used by software (such as Wireshark) to decrypt the TLS traffic.
i18n.zh-CN: 记录 TLS key（用于 Wireshark 解密）

i18n.en: Set default  maxVersion to 'TLSv1.2'. Use to disable support for TLSv1.3.
i18n.zh-CN: 允许最高 TLS 1.2

i18n.en: Set default  maxVersion to 'TLSv1.3'. Use to enable support for TLSv1.3.
i18n.zh-CN: 允许最高 TLS 1.3（默认）

i18n.en: Set default minVersion to 'TLSv1'. Use for compatibility with old TLS clients or servers.
i18n.zh-CN: 允许最低 TLS 1.0

i18n.en: Set default minVersion to 'TLSv1.1'. Use for compatibility with old TLS clients or servers.
i18n.zh-CN: 允许最低 TLS 1.1

i18n.en: Set default minVersion to 'TLSv1.2'. This is the default for 12.x and later, but the option is supported for compatibility with older Node.js versions.
i18n.zh-CN: 允许最低 TLS 1.2（默认）

i18n.en: Set default minVersion to 'TLSv1.3'. Use to disable support for TLSv1.2 in favour of TLSv1.3, which is more secure.
i18n.zh-CN: 允许最低 TLS 1.3

i18n.en: Print stack traces for deprecations.
i18n.zh-CN: deprecation 时打印堆栈

i18n.en: A comma-separated list of categories that should be traced when trace event tracing is enabled using --trace-events-enabled.
i18n.zh-CN: trace event 类别（性能分析）

i18n.en: Template string specifying the filepath for the trace event data, it supports ${rotation} and ${pid}.
i18n.zh-CN: trace event 输出文件名模板

i18n.en: Enable the collection of trace event tracing information.
i18n.zh-CN: 启用 trace events

i18n.en: Prints a stack trace whenever an environment is exited proactively, i.e. invoking `process.exit()`.
Prints a stack trace on SIGINT.
i18n.zh-CN: SIGINT 时打印 JS 堆栈

i18n.en: Print a stack trace whenever synchronous I/O is detected after the first turn of the event loop.
Prints TLS packet trace information to stderr.

Print stack traces for uncaught exceptions; usually, the stack trace associated with the creation of an Error is printed, whereas this makes Node.js also print the stack trace associated with throwing the value (which does not need to be an Error instance).
i18n.zh-CN: 未捕获异常时打印更多堆栈

i18n.en: Print stack traces for process warnings (including deprecations).
i18n.zh-CN: warning 时打印堆栈

i18n.en: Track heap object allocations for heap snapshots.
i18n.zh-CN: 在堆 snapshot 中标识对象创建栈

i18n.en: Define the behavior for unhandled rejections. Can be one of `strict` (raise an error), `warn` (enforce warnings) or `none` (silence warnings).
i18n.zh-CN: 未处理的 Promise reject 行为

i18n.en: Use bundled Mozilla CA store as supplied by current Node.js version or use OpenSSL's default CA store.  The default store is selectable at build-time.
Parse proxy settings from HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY/NO_PROXY environment variables and apply the setting in global HTTP/HTTPS clients.

Use the trusted CA certificates present in the system store, in addition to the certificates in the bundled Mozilla CA store and certificates from `NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS`. On Windows and macOS, it uses system APIs to integrate additional trusted certificates. On other platforms it is similar to `--use-openssl-ca` with the difference being that it caches the certificates on first load, and the system certificates are added in a complementary manner without replacing certificates from other sources. This flag supersedes `--use-openssl-ca`.
Re-map the Node.js static code to large memory pages at startup. If supported on the target system, this will cause the Node.js static code to be moved onto 2 MiB pages instead of 4 KiB pages.
i18n.zh-CN: 尝试把代码段映射到大页内存

i18n.en: Print V8 command-line options.
i18n.zh-CN: 打印所有 V8 选项

i18n.en: Set V8's thread pool size which will be used to allocate background jobs.  If set to 0 then V8 will choose an appropriate size of the thread pool based on the number of online processors. If the value provided is larger than V8's maximum, then the largest value will be chosen.
i18n.zh-CN: V8 后台线程池大小

i18n.en: Starts Node.js in watch mode. When in watch mode, changes in the watched files cause the Node.js process to restart.
i18n.zh-CN: 监听文件改动并重启

i18n.en: Starts Node.js in watch mode and specifies what paths to watch. When in watch mode, changes in the watched paths cause the Node.js process to restart.
Customizes the signal sent to the process on watch mode restarts.
Automatically zero-fills all newly allocated Buffer and SlowBuffer instances.
i18n.zh-CN: Buffer.allocUnsafe 也置零

i18n.en: Check the script's syntax without executing it.  Exits with an error code if script is invalid.
i18n.zh-CN: 只做语法检查不执行

i18n.en: Evaluate string as JavaScript.
Print command-line options.  The output of this option is less detailed than this document.
i18n.zh-CN: 显示帮助

i18n.en: Open the REPL even if stdin does not appear to be a terminal.
i18n.zh-CN: 强制 REPL 模式（即使 stdin 不是 TTY）

i18n.en: Identical to -e, but prints the result.
i18n.zh-CN: 等同 -e 但同时打印结果

i18n.en: Preload the specified module at startup.  Follows `require()`'s module resolution rules.  module may be either a path to a file, or a Node.js module name.
Print node's version.
i18n.zh-CN: 打印 Node.js 版本
